secondJobHolders.note: Number of UK employees holding a second job (Labour Force Survey)

nhsSecondJobs.note: Percentage of NHS staff in England reported to hold a second job

financialNecessity.note: Percentage of second job holders citing financial necessity as primary reason

sources.name: Office for National Statistics
sources.dataset: Labour Force Survey — employees with second jobs

sources.name: NHS Staff Survey / Health Foundation
sources.dataset: Analysis of NHS staff secondary employment

sources.name: CIPD
sources.dataset: Good Work Index — reasons for second employment

metadata.methodology: Second job holders from ONS Labour Force Survey employment data — seasonally adjusted estimates. NHS second job rate from analysis of NHS Staff Survey responses and Health Foundation secondary analysis. Financial necessity figures from CIPD Good Work Index survey of employees holding multiple jobs.
knownIssues: LFS definition of second job may exclude some gig economy and platform work
NHS figures are self-reported and may underestimate due to social desirability bias
Financial necessity classification is subjective — some blend financial need with career development motives
